articles.author: Matthew Lee
articles.title: Rubio tries to sell Iran war to skeptical G7 diplomats after Trump insults allies - AP News
articles.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is in France to meet his Group of Seven counterparts after President Donald Trump attacked NATO over a reluctance or refusal to take part in the Iran war. Some of America’s closest and oldest allies have met the conflict wi…
articles.content: VAUX-DE-CERNAY, France (AP) U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is in France meeting his Group of Seven foreign minister counterparts on Friday, after President Donald Trump attacked NATO countries o… [+5568 chars]
